2026-04-13T18:08:41.6868790Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6873114Z ---
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6873766Z description: |
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6874725Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6876465Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6878169Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6879486Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6879768Z on:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6880365Z   push:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6881002Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6881745Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6882212Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6882515Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6882991Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6883286Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6883711Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6883990Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6884720Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6885624Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6886299Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6886920Z   noop:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6887566Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6888362Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6889187Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6890447Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6891961Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6892797Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6893657Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6894626Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6895326Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6896078Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6896787Z       steps:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6897485Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6898459Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6906338Z           env:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6907544Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6909235Z           with:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6909906Z             script: |
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6910890Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6912178Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6913528Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6914761Z                 return;
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6915471Z               }
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6915854Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6916590Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6918030Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6919340Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6920244Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6921983Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6923658Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6925498Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6926671Z               }
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6927062Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6927766Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6929151Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6930009Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T18:08:41.6931043Z                 ref: 'main',

2026-04-13T18:08:41.6932987Z               });

2026-04-13T18:08:41.7064424Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7065306Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7065988Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7066616Z   noop:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7067281Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7068080Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7068712Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7070159Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7071652Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7072486Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7073348Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7074320Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7075037Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7075818Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7076537Z       steps:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7077260Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7078258Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7079413Z           env:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7080594Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7082045Z           with:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7082729Z             script: |
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7083713Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7085022Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7086381Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7088036Z                 return;
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7088762Z               }
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7089428Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7089878Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7091344Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7092405Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7093322Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7095069Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7096766Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7123373Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7124752Z               }
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7125181Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7125740Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7126954Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7127848Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7129250Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7130198Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7131207Z               });
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7132151Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7133057Z 
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7133327Z tools:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7133961Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7134621Z   github:
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7135295Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7135865Z

2026-04-13T18:08:41.7137300Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7138718Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T18:08:41.7163083Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
